work_summary: Created Administratum Post Work Bundle contract V0.1.
Created JSON schemas for bundle manifest, organ receipt, and bundle index card.
Created a runnable standard-library Administratum checker for structural bundle admission.
Created Post Work Organ Ring contract, required nine-organ matrix, and organ receipt template.
Created narrow Custodes organ matrix audit contract.
Created task report bundle indexes, organ receipts, validation receipts, closure receipts, and Russian owner summary.
completion_boundary: Completion requires validator pass, commit, normal non-force push, and final no-write remote equality proof.
